title: Verify Induct and Extract Position Information on the Hospital HMI Operations Menu
summary: Check the documented read-only fields on the Hospital HMI Operations Menu for the induct and extract sides of the station and capture the currently displayed AGV#, Tote ID, Bar Code, and Status information.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to view and record the current Induct Position and Extract Position information shown on the Hospital HMI Operations Menu, including AGV#, Tote ID, Bar Code, and Status fields that are received from the WCS.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to modify Induct Position or Extract Position values, because the source states this information is read-only.
Do not use this procedure as a corrective action procedure for missing, unclear, or incorrect values, because the source defines displayed fields but does not provide corrective actions.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the Hospital HMI Operations Menu and read or record the displayed Induct Position and Extract Position information.

safety_notes: The Induct Position and Extract Position information on this screen is read-only and received from the WCS.
Do not attempt to modify displayed values.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Hospital HMI Operations Menu screen
Ability to view the Induct Position and Extract Position sections

access_required: Access to the Hospital HMI Operations Menu screen
system_preconditions: The Hospital HMI Operations Menu screen is available for viewing.
The Induct Position and Extract Position sections are visible on the screen.

visual_references.description: Hospital HMI Operations screen showing the read-only Induct Position and Extract Position sections with AGV#, Tote ID, Bar Code, and Status fields.
Related hospital HMI screen showing induct-side position information fields.
Related hospital HMI screen showing extract-side position information fields.
Related hospital HMI screen showing extract position information fields in an exception context.
Related hospital HMI screen showing extract position information fields in a mismatch context.
Related hospital HMI screen showing extract position information fields in a tote failed to empty context.
Related hospital HMI screen showing extract position information fields in a sent from bagging station context.
Later hospital station operation artifact referencing use of status fields on the HMI.

steps.title: Open or view the Hospital HMI Operations Menu
steps.purpose: Access the screen that displays the read-only Induct Position and Extract Position information.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Hospital HMI Operations Menu screen and confirm that the Induct Position and Extract Position areas are visible.
steps.expected_result: The Hospital HMI Operations Menu is visible with both position sections available for review.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shows the Induct Position and Extract Position sections on the Operations Menu.
steps.failure_condition: The Operations Menu cannot be viewed or the Induct Position and Extract Position sections are not visible.

actions.label: View Operations Menu
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Hospital HMI Operations Menu screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Induct Position and Extract Position sections on the Hospital HMI Operations Screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Hospital HMI Operations Menu screen is not available.
The Induct Position or Extract Position sections are missing from view.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Induct Position" and "Extract Position" information on this screen is read-only and received from the WCS.

steps.title: Locate the Induct Position fields
steps.purpose: Identify the documented fields for the induct side before reading values.
steps.instruction: Locate the Induct Position section and identify the AGV#, Tote ID, Bar Code, and Status fields.
steps.expected_result: The operator can identify all four documented fields in the Induct Position section.
steps.healthy_condition: AGV#, Tote ID, Bar Code, and Status are visible in the Induct Position area.
steps.failure_condition: One or more documented Induct Position fields cannot be identified.

actions.label: Identify induct fields
actions.exact_action: Locate the Induct Position section and identify the AGV#, Tote ID, Bar Code, and Status fields.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Induct Position area and its AGV#, Tote ID, Bar Code, and Status fields.

stop_or_escalate_if: Any required Induct Position field is missing or unclear on the screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Induct Position: AGV# is the ID number of the AGV at the induct side of the station; Tote ID is the ID number of the tote at the induct side of the station; Bar Code is the information received from the tote bar code; Status is a status message received from the WCS about the tote.

steps.title: Read the induct AGV number
steps.purpose: Capture the AGV identifier shown for the induct side.
steps.instruction: Read and record the AGV# shown for the induct side of the station.
steps.expected_result: The current induct-side AGV# is captured.
steps.healthy_condition: An AGV# is visible and can be read from the Induct Position section.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV# is missing, unreadable, or unclear.

actions.label: Record induct AGV#
actions.exact_action: Read and record the AGV# shown for the induct side of the station.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The AGV# field in the Induct Position section.

stop_or_escalate_if: The induct AGV# is missing or unclear on the screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: AGV# is the ID number of the AGV at the induct side of the station.

steps.instruction: Read and record the Tote ID shown for the induct side of the station.
steps.expected_result: The current induct-side Tote ID is captured.
steps.healthy_condition: A Tote ID is visible and can be read from the Induct Position section.
steps.failure_condition: The Tote ID is missing, unreadable, or unclear.

actions.label: Record induct Tote ID

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Tote ID field in the Induct Position section.

stop_or_escalate_if: The induct Tote ID is missing or unclear on the screen.

steps.title: Read the induct status message

steps.instruction: Read and record the Status message shown for the induct side of the station.
steps.expected_result: The current induct-side Status message is captured.
steps.healthy_condition: A Status message is visible and can be read from the Induct Position section.
steps.failure_condition: The Status message is missing, unreadable, or unclear.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Status is a status message received from the WCS about the tote.
The status messages will tell the station operator why the tote is there and what menu they need to use and what action they need to perform.

steps.title: Confirm the fields are read-only WCS information
steps.purpose: Ensure the operator treats the displayed values as informational fields received from the WCS rather than editable controls.
steps.instruction: Verify that the Induct Position and Extract Position fields are being treated as read-only information received from the WCS.
steps.expected_result: The operator has confirmed that the displayed values are read-only WCS-provided information and has not attempted to modify them.
steps.healthy_condition: The fields are used only for viewing and recording information.
steps.failure_condition: There is an attempt to use this screen to change values, or the operator cannot determine whether the information should be treated as read-only.

actions.label: Confirm read-only status
actions.exact_action: Verify that these fields are being treated as read-only information received from the WCS.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Induct Position and Extract Position information areas described as read-only and received from the WCS.

stop_or_escalate_if: There is any need to modify displayed values.
Required values are missing or unclear on the screen.
Corrective action is needed beyond viewing and recording the displayed information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Induct Position" and "Extract Position" information on this screen is read-only and received from the WCS.

success_criteria: The Hospital HMI Operations Menu was viewed successfully.
The operator identified the AGV#, Tote ID, Bar Code, and Status fields for both Induct Position and Extract Position.
The current values for AGV#, Tote ID, Bar Code, and Status were read and recorded for both sides of the station.
The fields were treated as read-only information received from the WCS.
healthy_conditions: The Operations Menu displays both Induct Position and Extract Position sections.
AGV#, Tote ID, Bar Code, and Status fields are visible for both sides.
Status messages are present and readable as WCS-provided tote information.
The operator can capture the displayed values without attempting to modify them.
failure_conditions: The Hospital HMI Operations Menu cannot be viewed.
One or more required fields are missing, unreadable, or unclear.
The operator attempts to modify values that the source defines as read-only.
The source does not provide corrective actions for missing or unclear values.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if required values are missing or unclear on the screen.
Escalate if corrective action is needed, because this source section defines displayed fields but does not provide corrective actions.
Stop and escalate rather than attempting to modify displayed values, because the information is read-only and received from the WCS.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Hospital HMI Operations Screen showing the Induct Position and Extract Position sections and their AGV#, Tote ID, Bar Code, and Status fields.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The "Induct Position" and "Extract Position" information on this screen is read-only and received from the WCS.

Induct Position: AGV# is the ID number of the AGV at the induct side of the station; Tote ID is the ID number of the tote at the induct side of the station; Bar Code is the information received from the tote bar code; Status is a status message received from the WCS about the tote. Extract Position includes the same field definitions for the extract side.

missing_details: The source does not provide acceptance thresholds or expected values for AGV#, Tote ID, Bar Code, or Status.
The source does not provide corrective actions for missing, unclear, or incorrect displayed values.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required.
The source does not define a separate supporting role for this procedure.
